title: carex elongata
intro: Carex elongata, also known as Long-stalked sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Carex, which includes over 1,600 species of sedges. Traditionally, Carex elongata has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and even acting as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Carex elongata is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
